coreMeaning.cn: 阿佛洛狄忒（希腊爱与美女神）
coreMeaning.en: Greek goddess of love and beauty

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Aphrodite → 泡沫(aphro)中诞生的爱神

coreMeaning.en: plural of apiary; places where bees are kept

api(蜂) + arist(人) → 养蜂人
apiarist + s → 多位养蜂人

coreMeaning.en: a place where bees are kept

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: api(蜂) + ary(场所) → 养蜂场

coreMeaning.en: plural of apex; tips or summits

api(蜂) + culture(培育) → 养蜂业
a(每) + piece(个) → 每人一个

coreMeaning.en: imitating, especially in a slavish manner

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: ape(猿) → aping(像猿一样拙劣模仿)
ape(猿) + ish(像…的) → 像猿一样愚蠢

coreMeaning.en: incomplete development or absence of an organ or tissue

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'a-(无) + plasia(形成)', 'desc': '无法正常形成'}, {'form': 'aplasia', 'desc': '发育不全'}]}

a + plenty(充足) → 充裕有余

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'à plomb', 'desc': '法语：垂直地（铅锤）'}, {'form': 'aplomb', 'desc': '稳定；泰然自若'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: à plomb(铅垂线) → 像铅锤一样稳定 → 沉着

coreMeaning.en: plural of apnoea; temporary cessations of breathing

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apnoea + ic → 与呼吸暂停相关的
apo- → 希腊语：离开、分离

coreMeaning.en: a prophetic revelation; a cataclysmic event

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'apokalyptein', 'desc': '希腊语：揭开遮盖物'}, {'form': 'apocalypse', 'desc': '启示录；天启'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apo(揭开) + calypse(遮盖) → 揭开遮盖 → 天启

coreMeaning.cn: 启示录（复数）；多次天启事件

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apocalypse + s → 多次天启事件

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apocalypse + ic → 天启性质的
apocalyptic + ally → 以天启方式

coreMeaning.cn: 次经；伪经；真实性存疑的文献
coreMeaning.en: writings of doubtful authenticity; biblical texts excluded from canon

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'form': 'apokryphos', 'desc': '希腊语：隐藏的'}, {'form': 'apocrypha', 'desc': '次经；真实性可疑之作'}]}

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apo(离) + crypha(隐藏) → 隐秘的文字 → 伪经

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apocrypha + l → 真实性令人怀疑的
a(无) + pod(脚) + al → 无足的

coreMeaning.cn: 绝对确定的；不容置疑的

coreMeaning.en: the dressing room in an ancient Greek or Roman bath

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: apo(脱去) + dyterium(衣物) → 更衣室

coreMeaning.en: the highest point; the farthest point from Earth in an orbit

coreMeaning.en: a grammatical construction in which one element serves two clauses
